name: talking-pets
description: Read Codex Pet bubbles and Codex assistant replies aloud with local TTS.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/talking-pet-mvp.js && node --check src/provider-capabilities.js && node --check scripts/audio-platform.mjs && node --check scripts/wav-duration.mjs && node --check scripts/latency-lines-to-table.mjs && node --check scripts/pet-rollout-monitor.mjs && node --check scripts/tts-kokoro.mjs && node --check scripts/tts-voicebox.mjs && node --check scripts/tts-irodori.mjs && node --check scripts/tts-melotts.mjs && node --check scripts/latency-benchmark.mjs && node --check scripts/check-node-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/check-codex-compat.mjs && node --check scripts/check-audio-path.mjs && node --check scripts/check-config-files.mjs && node --check scripts/check-installer-configs.mjs && node --check scripts/check-markdown-links.mjs && node --check scripts/check-public-output-sanitizer.mjs && node --check scripts/check-release-readiness.mjs && node --check scripts/check-swift-cli.mjs && node --check scripts/check-platform-scripts.mjs && node --check scripts/check-npm-pack.mjs && node --check scripts/sanitize-public-output.mjs
